Rule.name: Toolkit-MoverAccessRebalance
Rule.Description:
Detects department changes and rebalances role assignments. Removes roles specific to the old department, adds roles for the new department, and flags the identity for certification when sensitive roles are affected.
Trigger: Fire when the 'department' attribute changes on an identity. Variables in scope: context (SailPointContext), identity (Identity), previousIdentity (Identity), newIdentity (Identity).
